title: Dragon Delivery Service
hook: Meet Ember, the young dragon courier
ending: Ember sits at her windowsill under the stars, medal and compass in her lap â€” the smallest dragon, the bravest courier, ready to fly again tomorrow.

scenes.visual: Close-up shot of Ember's face, looking directly at the camera with a friendly smile
scenes.narration: In a magical kingdom, where dragons and magic are a part of everyday life, meet Ember, the youngest member of the Dragon Delivery Service
scenes.camera: Static close-up shot

scenes.visual: Ember is shown standing in front of a large, ancient-looking map of the kingdom, with various routes and destinations marked
scenes.narration: With her keen sense of direction and agility, Ember navigates the kingdom, delivering packages to even the most remote locations
scenes.camera: Panoramic view of the map

scenes.visual: Ember is seen flying over a bustling market, weaving through stalls and people with ease
scenes.narration: From the bustling markets of Willowdale to the snow-capped mountains of Frostbite Peak, Ember's deliveries bring joy and excitement to the people of the kingdom
scenes.camera: Aerial shot, following Ember as she flies

scenes.visual: Ember lands on a rooftop, where an old man is waiting with a package
scenes.narration: With a keen sense of responsibility, Ember carefully collects and delivers each package, earning the trust of her clients
scenes.camera: Static shot of the rooftop, with Ember and the old man in the center

scenes.visual: Ember is shown flying through a dark and stormy night, lightning illuminating the sky
scenes.narration: Even in the most challenging weather conditions, Ember perseveres, determined to complete her deliveries
scenes.camera: Aerial shot, following Ember as she flies through the storm

scenes.visual: Ember returns to the Dragon Delivery Service headquarters, where her colleagues are waiting with smiles and praise
scenes.narration: After a long day of flying and delivering, Ember returns home to the warm welcome of her fellow dragons
scenes.camera: Static shot of the headquarters, with Ember and her colleagues in the center

scenes.visual: Ember is shown sitting on a windowsill, looking out at the kingdom with a contented expression
scenes.narration: As the sun sets on another successful day, Ember reflects on the joy and purpose she finds in her work as a dragon courier
scenes.camera: Static shot of Ember on the windowsill

scenes.visual: Ember stands at her doorstep before dawn, staring down at a mysterious package that glows with soft blue enchanted light, ancient runes etched into its surface
scenes.narration: But one morning, long before the kingdom stirs, Ember discovers a mysterious package at her door â€” sealed with ancient runes and glowing with magic she has never seen before. Only she can uncover its secret. And so the adventure truly begins.
scenes.camera: Low angle slow push-in, Ember silhouetted against a purple pre-dawn sky

scenes.visual: Ember crouches at her doorstep, clawed hands carefully opening the mysterious package to reveal a glowing golden compass inside
scenes.narration: With trembling claws, Ember opens the package. Inside, a golden compass pulses with warm light â€” and a tucked note that reads: the kingdom needs its bravest courier. This was no ordinary delivery. This was a calling.
scenes.camera: Close-up push-in on the open package, Ember's wide eyes reflecting golden light

scenes.visual: Ember spreads her wings on a rooftop at sunrise and launches into the sky, soaring high above the kingdom with the golden compass glowing on her chest
scenes.narration: Ember straps the compass to her chest, takes a deep breath, and leaps into the golden dawn. Wings wide, heart full â€” because that is what dragon couriers do. They always make the delivery.
scenes.camera: Wide aerial shot pulling back as Ember soars upward into the glowing dawn sky above the kingdom

scenes.visual: Ember flies north over rolling hills, the landscape growing darker and wilder ahead of her
scenes.narration: The compass pulls her north, past the edge of every map she has ever known, toward a dark and ancient forest the kingdom's elders only speak of in hushed tones.
scenes.camera: Aerial tracking shot behind Ember as she flies toward a shadowy treeline on the horizon

scenes.visual: Ember lands in a gloomy hidden village where the people look exhausted and the lanterns are all dark
scenes.narration: Hidden beneath the twisted canopy, Ember finds a village trapped in shadow â€” its lanterns dark, its people pale and weak, their magic slowly fading like embers in the rain.
scenes.camera: Wide establishing shot of the shadowed village with Ember small in the center

scenes.visual: An old village elder holds Ember's claw and shows her a glowing vision of a massive dark crystal deep in the forest
scenes.narration: An ancient elder takes her hand and shows her a vision â€” a dark crystal buried deep in the forest, pulsing with stolen magic, feeding on the light of everything it touches.
scenes.camera: Close two-shot of elder and Ember, vision of dark crystal shimmering between them

scenes.visual: Ember alone in a vast underground cavern, facing a massive dark crystal that crackles with stolen magic
scenes.narration: Ember descends into the cavern alone. The dark crystal towers above her, crackling with stolen magic, humming with a terrible power. For the first time in her young life â€” she is afraid.
scenes.camera: Low angle wide shot â€” crystal towers huge, Ember tiny below it

scenes.visual: A montage vision swirls around Ember â€” faces of everyone she has delivered to, all the smiles and grateful eyes
scenes.narration: Then she remembers. Every door she has knocked on. Every smile she has earned. Every person who trusted her to find them â€” no matter the distance, no matter the storm. She is not afraid. She is their courage.
scenes.camera: Close-up on Ember's face, reflections of the people she has helped glowing in her eyes

scenes.visual: Ember unleashes a massive blast of golden-fire breath at the dark crystal, compass blazing, the crystal exploding in brilliant light
scenes.narration: She takes one deep breath â€” and breathes. Not just fire. But every ounce of heart she has. The compass blazes gold. The dragon's flame and ancient magic collide â€” and together, they shatter the darkness.
scenes.camera: Wide dramatic shot â€” Ember breathing golden fire, crystal shattering in an explosion of light

scenes.visual: The hidden village reawakens â€” lanterns blazing back to life, flowers blooming, color flooding back into everything
scenes.narration: Magic floods back through the forest like a sunrise. Lanterns reignite on their own. Flowers push through the frost. Color returns to everything. And a village that had forgotten hope â€” remembers.
scenes.camera: Wide shot of the village transforming from grey to vibrant as magic returns

scenes.visual: The villagers lift Ember onto their shoulders, cheering and celebrating her as a hero
scenes.narration: They lift her on their shoulders and cheer a name she has always carried â€” but only now truly earned. Not just courier. Not just Ember. Hero.
scenes.camera: Low angle looking up at Ember held aloft by celebrating villagers

scenes.visual: Ember glides through the moonlit sky back toward the Dragon Delivery Service headquarters where her colleagues wait outside cheering
scenes.narration: As the twin moons rise over the kingdom, Ember glides home. Her colleagues wait at the gates â€” and even Commander Scales, who has never once smiled at anyone â€” is smiling.
scenes.camera: Wide aerial shot of Ember descending toward warm glowing headquarters under twin moons

scenes.visual: Ember sits at her windowsill at night, compass glowing softly in her lap, stars above, a new package waiting at her door below
scenes.narration: That night, Ember sits at her windowsill. The compass rests warm in her lap, the kingdom stretches quiet below, and the stars fill the sky like a million tiny lanterns. On her doorstep, she notices â€” another package is already waiting. She smiles. There will always be another delivery. And she will always make it. No matter how far. No matter how dark. Because that is who she is. Ember. Dragon courier. And the bravest there ever was.
scenes.camera: Slow wide pull-back from close on Ember's peaceful face to reveal the whole kingdom beyond her window

scenes.visual: Close-up of Ember holding the new package, staring at a royal golden dragon wax seal on it
scenes.narration: The package on her doorstep bears a wax seal she has never seen â€” a golden dragon crest pressed deep into crimson wax. The seal of the King.
scenes.camera: Extreme close-up of the wax seal, Ember's clawed fingers trembling slightly

scenes.visual: Ember flies toward the royal palace, its golden spires gleaming in the morning light, looking very small against it
scenes.narration: She has delivered to every corner of the kingdom â€” to farmers and fishermen, to widows and wanderers. But she has never once been called to the palace. Her wings tremble as the golden spires come into view.
scenes.camera: Wide aerial shot â€” Ember tiny against the massive glittering palace ahead

scenes.visual: The palace gates swing open to reveal an enormous crowd of the entire kingdom gathered inside, all looking at Ember
scenes.narration: The gates open. And Ember's breath catches in her chest. The entire kingdom has come. Lining every wall, filling every balcony, crowding every courtyard â€” all of them, waiting. For her.
scenes.camera: Low angle shot from Ember's POV â€” gates opening, crowd revealed

scenes.visual: The King and Queen walk down grand palace steps toward Ember, the crowd parting for them
scenes.narration: The King and Queen descend the palace steps â€” slowly, deliberately. They do not send a herald. They do not send a guard. The King and Queen of the entire realm walk down themselves. To meet one small dragon courier.
scenes.camera: Wide shot â€” King and Queen descending steps, Ember small at the bottom

scenes.visual: Commander Scales â€” the stern old green dragon â€” steps forward and speaks with unexpected warmth and pride
scenes.narration: Commander Scales steps forward. The old dragon who has never praised anyone in forty years of service. His voice, when it comes, is not the bark of a commander. It is the voice of a teacher who finally sees what he always knew was there.
scenes.camera: Close-up on Commander Scales' face â€” stern features soft for the first time

scenes.visual: The King places the Royal Courier Medal around Ember's neck before the roaring crowd
scenes.narration: The King raises a medal â€” gold and deep blue, a dragon in flight at its center â€” and places it around her neck beside the compass. The crowd erupts. The sound shakes the palace walls. And Ember, the smallest dragon in the Dragon Delivery Service, stands taller than she ever has.
scenes.camera: Close-up on the medal being placed around Ember's neck, then pull back wide to show the crowd erupting

scenes.visual: Three young dragon hatchlings in the crowd stare at Ember with wide eyes full of wonder and admiration
scenes.narration: In the front of the crowd, three young dragon hatchlings press against the gate, staring. Their eyes are full of something Ember recognizes â€” because she felt it once, long ago, standing outside these very gates, too small and too young and too uncertain. Wonder.
scenes.camera: Close-up on the hatchlings' faces â€” awe and inspiration written plainly

scenes.visual: Ember sits quietly, holding both the medal and the compass, a small peaceful smile on her face
scenes.narration: Later, when they ask her what it feels like to be a hero, Ember looks at the medal, and then at the compass, and then back at them. She says: I just wanted to make sure the packages got there. Every one of them. That was always enough.
scenes.camera: Intimate close-up â€” Ember looking down at both glowing objects in her hands

scenes.visual: All the dragon couriers fly in perfect formation above the glowing kingdom at sunset
scenes.narration: As the sun melts into the horizon, the entire Dragon Delivery Service takes to the sky â€” every courier, every wing, flying in formation above the kingdom. A river of fire and color against the fading gold of the sky. For Ember. For all of them.
scenes.camera: Epic wide aerial shot â€” dragon formation against a blazing sunset sky

scenes.visual: Ember at her windowsill at night â€” medal and compass in her lap, stars above, kingdom below â€” the perfect final image
scenes.narration: That night, Ember sits at her windowsill one last time. The medal rests beside the compass in her lap. The kingdom glows quietly below. The stars fill the sky like a million tiny lanterns, each one a place she has not yet been, a door she has not yet knocked on, a person still waiting. She breathes in. She breathes out. And she smiles. Because she is Ember. Dragon courier. The smallest one they ever had. The bravest one there ever was. And tomorrow â€” tomorrow, she will fly again.
scenes.camera: Slow wide pull-back: close on Ember's peaceful face, widening to show the whole glowing kingdom under a vast starry sky
